no_speech_rules: No spoken words. No voice. No narration. No lip-sync to dialogue.
Mouth closed or neutral rest — no talking, mumbling, whisper, or vocal sounds.
No microphone pickup of host speech — silent reaction clip only.
motion_rules: Slow natural chest and shoulder breathing visible throughout.
Small head movements only: micro-nods, slight tilt toward guest or mic, slow return to center.
Subtle eye movement — attentive listening, not staring blankly.
Minimal hand movement; hands still if visible.
mouth_rules: Lips closed or slightly parted for idle breathing only — not shaped for words.
